case_title: GEMIGNANI, MICHAEL VS CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION C/O ERIC C

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY GEMIGNANI, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION C/O ERIC C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
CERT MAIL TO ERIC CHU C/O CSAAA RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEMIGNANI, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION C/O ERIC C $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM CAL STATE INS ASSN AAA FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION C/O ERIC C
